description_long: This is a two-tone baseball cap featuring a blue bill, blue side and back panels, and a light gray front panel. The cap has visible stitching along the seams and a fabric-covered button at the crown. The front panel displays a printed or embroidered logo with the text 'Phenom People' in blue and green. The back of the cap includes an adjustable strap opening, typical of snapback or strapback designs. The overall shape is structured, with a gently curved brim and a rounded, mid-profile crown. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic fabric and possibly cotton, with a soft, flexible structure.
description: A blue and gray structured baseball cap with a curved brim and 'Phenom People' logo on the front panel.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the blue back panels, crown button, and adjustable strap opening.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue side panel, curved brim, and partial front logo.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the light gray front panel and the full 'Phenom People' logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue side panel, curved brim, and partial front logo.
